description: Create a Talon voice module in %APPDATA%\Talon\user\yara_builder\ (C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\yara_builder\) that acts as a stateful YARA rule builder. Develop yara_builder.py to implement a Talon Module with a state mechanism and specific actions: yara_start_rule(name), yara_meta(key, value), yara_text_string(var_name, value), yara_hex_string(var_name, hex_bytes), yara_condition(condition), and yara_export(). The actions must handle space-to-underscore conversion for identifiers and format strings/hex bytes according to YARA syntax. The yara_export action must write the final rule to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\output.yar. Accompany this with yara_builder.talon to map voice commands for rules, metadata, strings, conditions, and exporting to the corresponding Python actions.
